description.value: Whether it be through a curse, a forced operation or a tragic accident this eye always seems to be gained under terrible circumstances but no matter how it's been it always seems to be a part of the Walker clan. Also at 1st level you must designate one of your eyes to become your cursed eye, when you do this a permanent tattoo like mark appears around it. Once you gain this ability you are automatically alerted when Aberrations, Celestials, Demons, Otsutsuki or Monstrosities would be within 60 feet of you and you now count as having true sight towards those creature types for the purposes of seeing through invisibility and seeing their true forms though this does not leave you blind to their disguises instead you see their true form float in the air behind them. At 7th level you are now automatically alerted when Aberrations, Celestials, Demons, Otsutsuki or Monstrosities would be within 1000 feet of you and you now gain advantage on checks made to find creatures of those types within this area. Additionally at 7th level once per long rest you can grant an allied creature Within 10 feet of you the benefits of this eye up to 1st level for 10 minutes.
